candidates.why: Direct match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Current asset component, not the total.
Non-current assets, not current assets.
Non-current asset component, not current assets.
Cash flow change line, not a balance sheet stock measure.
Cash flow sheet item, not total current assets.
Direct balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line.
Restricted cash should not be the primary CHE measure when unrestricted cash and equivalents is reported separately.

candidates.row_label: Cash and Cash Equivalents at the End of the Period
candidates.why: Cash flow period-end cash agrees conceptually, but balance sheet is preferred for CHE.

candidates.row_label: Cash and Cash Equivalents at the Beginning of the Period
candidates.why: Beginning balance, not year-end balance sheet cash.

candidates.row_label: Net Increase in Cash and Cash Equivalents
candidates.why: Flow, not stock.

candidates.row_label: Increase (decrease) in cash and cash equivalents after effect of exchange rate changes
candidates.why: Flow, not stock.
Flow, not cash balance.
Not total cash balance.

candidates.row_label: Investments in subsidiaries net after cash
candidates.why: Investing flow, not cash balance.

candidates.row_label: Cash receipts from repayment of advances and loans made to related parties
candidates.why: Cash inflow, not cash balance.

variables.notes: Use the balance-sheet cash line; restricted cash is separate and excluded.

candidates.why: Direct match for total current liabilities.
Current liability component, not the total.
Balancing item, not reported total.
Balancing value, not reported total.
Non-current liabilities, wrong horizon.
Non-current liability component.
Non-current liability component.

candidates.row_label: Other non current liabilities - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing value for non-current liabilities.
Balancing item, not current liabilities.
Best direct match for short-term debt/current borrowings; excludes lease liabilities and is financing-related current debt.
Would qualify as short-term debt if populated, but appears blank and less comprehensive than current interest-bearing debt.

variables.notes: R:c. Chose outside shortlist because it is the clear reported short-term debt line. Excludes 'Current lease liabilities' per instruction.

candidates.why: Best match for current tax payable/current income tax liability on the balance sheet.
Candidate list item, but on cash flow statement and not the preferred balance-sheet payable stock; also appears blank.
More likely payroll/VAT/social charges than income taxes payable.

variables.notes: Selected outside shortlist. 'Current Income Tax' is the closest balance-sheet current tax liability; 'Public duties payable' is likely non-income tax obligations.

candidates.why: Best reported total tangible fixed assets / net PPE line on the balance sheet.
Only one component of PPE, not total PPE.
Component of PPE, not total when a broader total exists.
Lease-related asset reported separately; baseline PPE target prefers total/net PPE and not lease-specific line when broader PPE exists.

candidates.row_label: Other Other Tangible Fixed Assets, Net
candidates.why: Not the clean reported total.

candidates.row_label: Acc Depr Other Tangible Fixed Assets
candidates.why: Accumulated depreciation, not PPE balance.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Gross
candidates.why: Gross lease asset component, not preferred total/net PPE.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Accumulated Depreciation
candidates.why: Accumulated depreciation, not PPE balance.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Net - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing item for lease assets, not preferred total PPE.

candidates.row_label: Investments in tangible and intangible assets
candidates.why: Capex flow, not PPE stock.
Intangibles, not PPE.
Intangibles, not PPE.

candidates.row_label: Total Intangible Assets, Net - Balancing value
candidates.why: Intangibles balancing value, not PPE.
Expense/flow, not PPE stock.

variables.notes: Best available total tangible asset line; preferred over component rows and separate right-of-use assets.

candidates.why: Direct match for total assets.
Long-term asset component, not total assets.

candidates.row_label: Net cash flow from operating activities
candidates.why: Direct match for operating cash flow/net cash from operating activities.

final_choice.row_label: Net cash flow from operating activities
